awaiting.title: Awaiting your payment confirmation ({n})
awaiting.desc: These companies have selected a paid plan, but the payment is not yet confirmed. Review and mark “Payment received” on the company row so it counts toward revenue.

kpi.registeredCompaniesInfo: Total active (non-archived) companies on the platform.
kpi.registeredUsersInfo: Total user accounts across the whole platform — owners, invited employees and all other company roles.
kpi.mrrInfo: MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue) = the total monthly revenue from subscriptions of companies with CONFIRMED payment. Trial periods and unconfirmed payments are NOT counted.
kpi.conversionInfo: Percentage of companies on a paid plan (Start/Business/Pro) out of all registered companies.

revenue.mrrInfo: Monthly subscription revenue with confirmed payment (our revenue).
revenue.arrInfo: ARR (Annual Recurring Revenue) = annual subscription revenue = MRR × 12.
revenue.turnoverInfo: The total value of invoices issued by the COMPANIES on the platform this month — this is their business turnover, NOT our subscription revenue. (A test invoice also counts here.)
revenue.growthInfo: Change in company turnover compared with last month.

growth.newInfo: Companies registered since the start of the current month.
growth.active30Info: Companies that logged into the app in the last 30 days.
growth.activatedInfo: Share of companies that actually started working (have a client or document).
growth.avgDocsInfo: Average documents issued per registered company.
growth.churnRiskInfo: Paid companies with no activity for 21+ days — potential churn. Consider reaching out to them.

docs.totalValueInfo: The sum of all invoices issued by companies on the platform (their turnover, not our revenue).

alerts.title: Automatic alerts
alerts.nearLimit: {name} is near its limit ({used}/{limit}) — likely upgrade.
alerts.hotLead: Hot lead: {name} (score {score}/100) — ready for a paid plan.

pageViews.title: Page views
pageViews.note: Counts are all page views, including repeats from the same visitor.

tools.title: Public tools
tools.note: Number of visits to each public tool.

visits.title: Site visits and activity
visits.noData: No data accumulated for this period yet.
visits.allTime: All-time on the site: {v} visitors · {u} active

companies.title: All companies
companies.subtitle: Standard companies and client companies (accounting firms are in the section above).
companies.note: A subscription change takes effect immediately — features are unlocked/locked automatically for that company. “Log into account” gives you technical access to the company’s account for assistance. Deleting archives the company (see the section below) — data is kept and can be restored.

emails.title: Emails & Notification Center
emails.note: Retry on SMTP error: 5 min → 30 min → 2 h → 24 h. After exhaustion the address is added to the Blacklist. The queue and reminders are processed by {cron} (daily cron).

blog.title: Blog ({n})
blog.empty: No articles. Click “Load 10 SEO articles” or create a new one.

firm.subTitle: Accounting firm subscription
firm.subNote: A plan change is confirmed after payment by bank transfer. Contact us or select a higher plan below.
firm.bankNote: Once payment is received we activate the selected plan and issue an invoice. All prices are excl. VAT. 1 EUR = {rate} BGN.
